title: cicer graecum
intro: Cicer graecum, also known as chickling vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cicer graecum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cicer graecum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in some traditional herbal remedies as a tincture or powder.
